description: Authoritative machine-readable facade-coverage registry for MAN-475/#841. One row per business-service external HTTP endpoint, classified by Gateway exposure. The Nerv.IIP.FacadeCoverage.Tests gate reflects the live *EndpointContracts.All registries of every business service and fails CI if any live endpoint is missing here (unregistered) or if a row here no longer maps to a live endpoint (stale). See docs/architecture/facade-coverage-matrix.md for the governance narrative.

classifications.exposed: Reachable through a Gateway facade; the row records the facade operationId(s), verified to exist in the Gateway OpenAPI snapshot.
classifications.deferred: Service endpoint exists but no Gateway facade yet; a tracked gap that follows a frontend menu phase / issue.
classifications.internal: Never exposed through a Gateway by design (service-to-service, scheduler, or connector/WCS callback).
